cards.duringText: If your opponent has no cards in their deck, this card's value is 10 instead.
cards.title: another squandered life

cards.immediateText: Deal up to 3 damage to Death.
cards.title: This is going to be fun

cards.immediateText: Ignore the value of your opponent's card.
cards.title: I'm death, straight up

cards.afterText: Gain 1 action. Your opponent moves their fighter up to 2 spaces. Then, if the opposing fighter is not adjacent, Death recovers up to 2 health.
cards.title: I just Love the smell of fear

cards.basicText: Choose an opponent with a fighter in your zone. They discard 1 random card. Draw a number of cards equal to the BOOST value of the discarded card.
cards.title: Whistle

cards.immediateText: Return the top card of your opponent’s discard pile to their hand.
cards.title: Pick it up

cards.duringText:
Your opponent chooses:
> Prevent all combat damage.
> Their fighter takes damage equal to their card's BOOST value.
cards.title: Gonna take the coward's way out?

cards.afterText: If Death is at 2 health, your opponent draws cards equal to the amount of damage dealt.
cards.duringText: You may increase or decrease this card's value by 1.
cards.title: Laughing in the face of death

cards.basicText: If Death would take non-combat damage, you may discard this card to prevent that damage.
cards.immediateText: Cancel all effects on your opponent's card.
cards.title: sorry to crash the party

cards.afterText: Your opponent may move their fighter up to 3 spaces. Move Death up to 3 spaces.
cards.title: Corre, Corre

cards.afterText: Deal 1 damage to each fighter adjacent to Death. For each fighter defeated this way, Death recovers 1 health.
cards.title: every frivolous End

cards.basicText: This card’s effect cannot be canceled.
cards.duringText: You may BOOST your opponent's card. If Death is at 5 or fewer health, you must BOOST instead.
cards.title: I find the very idea absurd

hero.name: Death
hero.specialAbility: Death is only defeated when his health reaches exactly 1. If he would be defeated otherwise, set his health to 5 instead.

name: Death (Puss in Boots)
note:
Death is the main antagonist in Puss In Boots: The Last Wish. A really cool character and I wanted to get the feel that you can’t kill him but if you fight valiantly, he steps down but if you squander your life, he punishes you. Death has gotten a stupid amount of testing, and he is finally 100% finished! I managed to get him a TTS model and some custom art as well. Enjoy! 
TTS JSON: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1QHDF3F_j8-zzZhGqVsAFZfy30TTYHHTm/view?usp=sharing
